verses.text: Topa aw, kei hehpihhuai-in cimawh ka hih manin na bil hong ngat in la, hong dawng in
Mihoih ka hih manin kei hong kem in. Nangmah a hong muang na nasempa hong hon in
Nang pen ka Pasian na hi hi. Topa aw, sun tawntung hong kiko ka hih manin kei hong hehpih in
Topa aw, nangma tungah thu hong ngen ka hih manin na nasempa hong kipaaksak in
Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa aw, nangmah hoihin mawhna na maisak a, hong ngente khempeuh tungah itna kip tampi na nei hi
Topa aw, ka thungetna hong za in la, nang tungah thumin kong kikona hong ngai in
Kei hong dawng na hih manin ka haksat hun ciangin nangma tungah kong ngen hi
Topa aw, pasian-te lakah nang tawh a kibang kuamah omlo a, nangma sep bang, kuamah in sem theilo hi
Topa aw, na bawlsa minam khempeuh hong pai-in na mai-ah hong kun ding uh a, nangma min hong phat ding uh hi
Bang hang hiam cih leh nangmah lianin na lamdangte na bawl a, nang bek Pasian na hi hi
Topa aw, nang tungah hong thumanin nangma lampi ka zuih theihna dingin kei hong hilh in la, nangma min a zahtakte tawh keima lungsim pumkhat hong bangsak in
Topa ka Pasian aw, ka lungsim khempeuh tawh na tungah ka lungdam a, nangma min ka thangsak ngitnget ding hi
Bang hang hiam cih leh keimah na hong itna kip lian mahmah a, Leinuai thuk sung panin kei nong honkhia khin hi
Pasian aw, mi kihisakte, kei langpangin hong kipan hi. Thu-helhawt mi pawlkhat in kei, thah hong sawm uh a, amaute in nang hong thudonlo uh hi
Ahih hangin Topa aw, nang pen a hehpih thei, a dik Pasian na hi a, heh hak mahmahin, itna kip leh thumanna tawh a kidim na hi hi
Kei lamah hong kihei in la, kei hong hehpih in. Na nasempa thahatsak in la, na nasem numei' tapa hong hon in
Topa nangmah in kei hong huhin, nong thahatsakna hangin, kei hong mudahte in mu-in a zahhuaina dingun keima tungah na maipha hong lak in.
